SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス UuidV7

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
public final class UuidV7 extends Object
Static factory for RFC 9562 UUID version 7 (Unix millisecond timestamp in the most significant bits, random in the remainder).

Timestamps use Instant.toEpochMilli() semantics: values are truncated toward zero to whole milliseconds (sub-millisecond components of Instant do not affect the embedded unix_ts_ms). Instants whose millisecond value is negative (before the Unix epoch) or greater than 281474976710655L are rejected with IllegalArgumentException.

For batchFromInstantOrderedInRange(java.time.Instant, java.time.Instant, int, java.util.random.RandomGenerator), when the closed millisecond range [min, max] is too narrow to fit count strictly increasing timestamps (max - min < count - 1), this implementation assigns timestamps with a non-decreasing staircase min&nbsp;+&nbsp;floor(i&nbsp;*&nbsp;(max&nbsp;-&nbsp;min)&nbsp;/&nbsp;(count&nbsp;-&nbsp;1)) for i in [0, count), filling random payload bits anew each time.

Public methods validate non-null references with NullPointerException where null is not permitted, and numeric contracts with IllegalArgumentException as documented.

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    static final long
    MAX_UNIX_TS_MS
    Inclusive maximum unix_ts_ms (48-bit unsigned).

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static @NonNull List<UUID>
    batchFromClock(@NonNull Clock clock, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int count, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Returns count UUID v7 values by calling Clock.instant() before each generation.
    static @NonNull List<UUID>
    batchFromInstant(@NonNull Instant instant, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int count, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Returns count UUID v7 values sharing the same embedded Unix millisecond as instant; random payload bits differ per element.
    static @NonNull List<UUID>
    batchFromInstantOrderedInRange(@NonNull Instant minInclusive, @NonNull Instant maxInclusive, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int count, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Returns count UUID v7 values whose embedded Unix milliseconds form a non-decreasing sequence; each millisecond lies in the closed range [minInclusive, maxInclusive] (Instant.toEpochMilli() after validation).
    static @NonNull UUID
    fromClock(@NonNull Clock clock)
    Creates a UUID v7 from Clock.instant(), using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull UUID
    fromClock(@NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Creates a UUID v7 from Clock.instant() and the given random generator.
    static @NonNull UUID
    fromInstant(@NonNull Instant instant)
    Creates a UUID v7 from an instant, using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull UUID
    fromInstant(@NonNull Instant instant, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Creates a UUID v7 from an instant and the given random generator.
    static @NonNull UUID
    fromInstantRandomInRange(@NonNull Instant minInclusive, @NonNull Instant maxInclusive, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Picks a uniformly random Unix millisecond in the closed range [minInclusive, maxInclusive] (compared via Instant.toEpochMilli() after validation), then creates a UUID v7 at that millisecond.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • フィールド詳細

    • MAX_UNIX_TS_MS

      public static final long MAX_UNIX_TS_MS
      Inclusive maximum unix_ts_ms (48-bit unsigned).
      関連項目:
      • 定数フィールド値

  • メソッドの詳細

    • fromInstant

      @NonNull public static @NonNull UUID fromInstant(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant)
      Creates a UUID v7 from an instant, using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      instant - source instant (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null UUID v7
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if instant is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromInstant

      @NonNull public static @NonNull UUID fromInstant(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Creates a UUID v7 from an instant and the given random generator.
      パラメータ:
      instant - source instant (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      random - source for rand_a and rand_b, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null UUID v7
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromClock

      @NonNull public static @NonNull UUID fromClock(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock)
      Creates a UUID v7 from Clock.instant(), using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null UUID v7
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if clock is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the clock instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromClock

      @NonNull public static @NonNull UUID fromClock(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Creates a UUID v7 from Clock.instant() and the given random generator.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      random - source for rand_a and rand_b, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null UUID v7
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the clock instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • batchFromInstant

      @NonNull public static @NonNull List<UUID> batchFromInstant(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int count, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Returns count UUID v7 values sharing the same embedded Unix millisecond as instant; random payload bits differ per element.
      パラメータ:
      instant - shared timestamp (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      count - number of UUIDs, must be positive
      random - source for random payload bits, must not be null
      戻り値:
      an unmodifiable list of length count
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if count is not positive or the instant is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • batchFromClock

      @NonNull public static @NonNull List<UUID> batchFromClock(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int count, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Returns count UUID v7 values by calling Clock.instant() before each generation. Embedded milliseconds are not necessarily non-decreasing if the clock moves backward.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      count - number of UUIDs, must be positive
      random - source for random payload bits, must not be null
      戻り値:
      an unmodifiable list of length count
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if count is not positive or any sampled instant is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromInstantRandomInRange

      @NonNull public static @NonNull UUID fromInstantRandomInRange(@NonNull @NonNull Instant minInclusive, @NonNull @NonNull Instant maxInclusive, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Picks a uniformly random Unix millisecond in the closed range [minInclusive, maxInclusive] (compared via Instant.toEpochMilli() after validation), then creates a UUID v7 at that millisecond.
      パラメータ:
      minInclusive - range lower bound (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      maxInclusive - range upper bound (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      random - source for the millisecond draw and payload bits, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null UUID v7
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if minInclusive.compareTo(maxInclusive) > 0, or either bound's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • batchFromInstantOrderedInRange

      @NonNull public static @NonNull List<UUID> batchFromInstantOrderedInRange(@NonNull @NonNull Instant minInclusive, @NonNull @NonNull Instant maxInclusive, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int count, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Returns count UUID v7 values whose embedded Unix milliseconds form a non-decreasing sequence; each millisecond lies in the closed range [minInclusive, maxInclusive] (Instant.toEpochMilli() after validation). When maxInclusive - minInclusive >= count - 1, a random starting millisecond is chosen so that start, start+1, … stays inside the range; otherwise the staircase rule described in the class documentation applies.
      パラメータ:
      minInclusive - range lower bound (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      maxInclusive - range upper bound (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      count - number of UUIDs, must be positive
      random - source for random payload bits (and wide-range start selection), must not be null
      戻り値:
      an unmodifiable list of length count
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if minInclusive.compareTo(maxInclusive) > 0, count is not positive, or either bound is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
